name: Adam Mosseri
role: Head of Instagram (oversees Instagram + Threads), Meta. 15+ years at Meta; ex-Head of Facebook News Feed.
primary_domain: Social media product strategy, ranking/recommendation systems, creator economy
secondary_domains: AI content, labeling & provenance ('AI slop', reality crisis)
Product leadership & working with Mark Zuckerberg
scope_note: Built ONLY from long-form (>=16 min) primary interviews where Mosseri speaks, published 2024-06-10 through 2026-02-25. Excludes: all sub-3-min clips (IG/TikTok/Shorts/AMAs), anything before 2024-06-01, and third-party commentary channels (e.g. DanielHillMedia) that talk ABOUT Mosseri rather than him speaking.
coverage_gaps: Transcripts are YouTube auto-captions (ASR) — quotes are near-verbatim; CHAT mode should live-ground the exact passage via the deeplink before quoting as verbatim.
s003 (Diletta Leotta) and s005 (HugoDecrypte) are auto-translated from Italian/French — wording is approximate; treat quotes as paraphrase-grade.
Audio-only podcast appearances without a captioned YouTube mirror were not harvested (e.g. Peter Kafka 'Channels' May 2025).
Text sources (Semafor article, Mosseri's year-end memos, Threads posts) were not harvested — corpus is video interviews only.
No book and no formal course exist for this author; his 'playbook' is the creator advice embedded in interviews (captured as 31 procedure EPs).
Content published after 2026-02-25 (latest source) is not captured.
One EP routed to product-strategy/platform-differentiation instead of competition/platform-differentiation (append-only; left as-is).
faithfulness: 7 match / 1 not-in-corpus / 0 contradictions (smoke test, indicative only) — see runs/faithfulness/log.md
